title: ov_gpu_unit_tests build fails: get_test_engine undeclared in paged_attention_gpu_test
root_cause: The new test function shared_kv_cache_test::reader_output_matches_reference (in paged_attention_gpu_test.cpp starting line 642) uses unqualified names: get_test_engine(), get_test_stream(), topology, input_info, reorder, format, data_types, activation, activation_func, ExecutionConfig, get_network, get_test_stream_ptr, mem_lock, layout, network - without tests:: and cldnn:: namespace prefixes. These were added by PR #36399 which was in the merge queue simultaneously with PR #36464.
key_errors: paged_attention_gpu_test.cpp:650:31: error: 'get_test_engine' was not declared in this scope; did you mean 'tests::get_test_engine'?
paged_attention_gpu_test.cpp:719:21: error: 'input_info' was not declared in this scope; did you mean 'cldnn::input_info'?
paged_attention_gpu_test.cpp:748:9: error: 'topology' was not declared in this scope; did you mean 'cldnn::topology'?
